subject: Dimension and bit-type change in Warp-generated IMOD stack
body:
Dear Dimitri and Warp users,

Happy New Year! I hope all of you had/are having great holidays!

I am writing to ask a quick question: are changes in image dimensions and
bit-type expected in Warp-generated IMOD stack (e.g., frames acquired on
Titan, dimensions halved, bit-type changed from 16-bit to 32-bit)?

Thank you for your help in advance!

Stay safe and take care!

Best,

Cyan

PhD student at the Physical Chemistry Curie Lab
